visualIssues.description: No loading indicators found - users may not know when data is being fetched

recommendations.solution: Add proper icons or text labels to all buttons, especially pagination and filter controls

recommendations.issue: Large number of transaction rows may impact performance
recommendations.solution: Implement virtual scrolling or pagination to limit DOM elements
Add pagination to help users navigate through large datasets
Add proper aria-labels or associate with label elements
